mnemonics: Sensors Are The Digital Eyes And Ears For Real-World Things (S.A.T.D.E.E.R.W.T. for IoT Digitization)
keyPoints: IoT digitization converts analog information from the physical world into digital data.
This process is enabled by sensors, actuators, and connectivity modules.
The ultimate goal is to enable data-driven analysis, automation, and decision-making.
commonMistakes: Thinking digitization is just about connecting a device to the internet, rather than the core process of converting physical phenomena to data.
Confusing digitization (converting analog to digital) with digital transformation (the broader business process change it enables).
Overlooking the importance of the quality and accuracy of the sensor data at the point of digitization.
